title: ASAM ODX List of Known Issues (LOKI)
downloaded: 2026-04-14
covers: Known issues and clarifications in the ODX standard. Helpful for our odx-converter conformance work.
license: ASAM publication, freely downloadable from public asam.net page (no login). Treat as ASAM copyrighted. Reference-only.
